sentences.arabic: ذَهَبْتُ إِلَى الصَّيْدَلِيَّةِ لِأَشْتَرِيَ دَوَاءً لِلصُّدَاعِ.
sentences.translation: Otišao sam u apoteku da kupim lijek protiv glavobolje.
sentences.translationEn: I went to the pharmacy to buy medicine for a headache.

sentences.translation: Farmaceut me pitao za ljekarski recept.
sentences.translationEn: The pharmacist asked me for the doctor's prescription.

sentences.arabic: شَرِبْتُ الدَّوَاءَ وَنِمْتُ قَلِيلًا فِي السَّرِيرِ.
sentences.translation: Popio sam lijek i malo odspavao u krevetu.
sentences.translationEn: I took the medicine and slept a little in bed.
